# Python dependencies for the Copilot Setup Steps workflow.
# Pin exact versions with SHA-256 hashes so pip verifies package integrity
# before installation (satisfies SonarCloud "verified versions" requirement).
#
# To update: run the following from the repo root:
#   echo "jsonschema==4.23.0" > /tmp/req.in
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes --no-annotate /tmp/req.in -o scripts/copilot-requirements.txt
#
# --require-hashes mode requires ALL resolved packages (including transitive
# dependencies) to be listed here. Generated with pip-compile (pip-tools).
